'''dadhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beauteously|beauteously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beauteously|beauteously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dadhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dadhate|dadhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dadhatesher|dadhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadhatesherĂ«m|dadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dadhatero|dadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dadhateshĂ«|dadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadhateshĂ«m|dadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidadhatero|gokidadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidadhateshĂ«|gokidadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadhateshĂ«m|gokidadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godadhankerom|godadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godadhankeshĂ«|godadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godadhankeshĂ«m|godadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godadhankeya|godadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dadhaterom|dadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadhatemu|dadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dadhateya|dadhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidadhaterom|gokidadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadhatemu|gokidadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidadhateya|gokidadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dadhadhate|dadhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dadhadhatesher|dadhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadhadhatesherĂ«m|dadhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dadhadhatero|dadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dadhadhateshĂ«|dadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadhadhateshĂ«m|dadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidadhadhatero|gokidadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidadhadhateshĂ«|gokidadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadhadhateshĂ«m|gokidadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godadhadhankerom|godadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godadhadhankeshĂ«|godadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godadhadhankeshĂ«m|godadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godadhadhankeya|godadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dadhadhaterom|dadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dadhadhatemu|dadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dadhadhateya|dadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidadhadhaterom|gokidadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidadhadhatemu|gokidadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidadhadhateya|gokidadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠdhĂŠte|dĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠdhĂŠtesher|dĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠdhĂŠtero|dĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokidĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|godĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|godĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠdhĂŠterom|dĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠdhĂŠtemu|dĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠdhĂŠteya|dĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokidĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokidĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafdhafte|dafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafdhaftesher|dafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafdhaftesherĂ«m|dafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafdhaftero|dafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafdhafteshĂ«|dafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafdhafteshĂ«m|dafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafdhaftero|gokidafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafdhafteshĂ«|gokidafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafdhafteshĂ«m|gokidafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafdhafnkerom|godafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafdhafnkeshĂ«|godafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafdhafnkeshĂ«m|godafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafdhafnkeya|godafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafdhafterom|dafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafdhaftemu|dafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafdhafteya|dafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafdhafterom|gokidafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafdhaftemu|gokidafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafdhafteya|gokidafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
